name: Angel Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:20
1. Cream the shortening.
2. Gradually add sugars, beating well at medium speed of an electric mixer.
3. Add egg and beat well.
4. Combine flour, baking soda, and cream of tartar; gradually add dry ingredients to creamed mixture, mixing well.
5. Add vanilla and mix well.
6. Shape dough into 1-inch balls.
7. Roll in powdered sugar.
8. Place on lightly greased cookie sheets.
9. Bake at 275 degrees for 10 to 12 minutes.
10. Cool on wire racks.
Yield: 4 dozen.
